item.name: Mastercard Confirm, Delete or Mark Record as Not Fraud for an Existing Suspected Fraud Record.

request.name: Mastercard Confirm, Delete or Mark Record as Not Fraud for an Existing Suspected Fraud Record.

description.content: This endpoint allows the initiator to change an existing suspected fraud to confirmed fraud, delete suspected fraud record or mark the suspected transaction as not fraud.

response.name: Something was wrong with the request.
Too Many Requests.

item.name: Get Status of an Existing Suspected Fraud Record for Mastercard Built Transactions.

request.name: Get Status of an Existing Suspected Fraud Record for Mastercard Built Transactions.

description.content: This endpoint allows the initiator to get the status of an existing suspected fraud record using combination of ICA and Ref ID or ACN, for Mastercard built transactions. The initiator can get status of the suspected fraud transaction submitted via Online & API channel.

query.description: Refers to the reference ID of the API call which was used to submit suspected fraud record. This is optional parameter if ACN is present in the request.
Refers to the ACN of the suspected fraud record whose status is to be fetched. This is optional parameter for record submitted through APIs.

variable.description: (Required) Refers to the ICA of the suspected fraud record which needs to be searched for its status. It is mandatory parameter along with Ref ID or ACN.

response.name: Fraud request status in the system.

variable.description: (Required) Refers to the ICA of the suspected fraud record which needs to be searched for its status. It is mandatory parameter along with Ref ID or ACN.

response.name: Something was wrong with the request.

variable.description: (Required) Refers to the ICA of the suspected fraud record which needs to be searched for its status. It is mandatory parameter along with Ref ID or ACN.

response.name: Too Many Requests.

variable.description: (Required) Refers to the ICA of the suspected fraud record which needs to be searched for its status. It is mandatory parameter along with Ref ID or ACN.

item.name: Add a New Suspected Fraud Record Using Minimal Input Parameters for Mastercard Built Transactions.

request.name: Add a New Suspected Fraud Record Using Minimal Input Parameters for Mastercard Built Transactions.

description.content: This endpoint allows the initiator to add a new suspected fraud record using minimal input parameters for Mastercard built transactions. To submit a transaction as suspected fraud, a match has to be found in the Mastercard transaction data repository(Data Warehouse).

response.name: Something was wrong with the request.
Too Many Requests.

item.name: Change an Existing Suspected Fraud Record Using Minimal Input Parameters for Mastercard Built Transactions.

request.name: Change an Existing Suspected Fraud Record Using Minimal Input Parameters for Mastercard Built Transactions.

description.content: This endpoint allows the initiator to change an existing suspected fraud record using minimal input parameters for Mastercard built transactions. The initiator can modify both successful and rejected suspected fraud transactions and also modify transactions which are submitted via other channels Online and API.

response.name: Something was wrong with the request.
Too Many Requests.

item.name: Add a New Suspected Fraud Record Using Minimal Input Parameters for Mastercard Built Transactions.

response.name: Something was wrong with the request.

description.content:
The Suspected Fraud application sends a potentially fraudulent transaction for review to the relevant issuer to determine if the suspected transaction is fraudulent or valid. After the issuer's investigation, the application validates the transaction(s) as Confirmed Fraud or Confirmed Not Fraud.

Contact Support:
 Name: API Support
 Email: apisupport@mastercard.com
